title: TUPARKA 270 PCS Electrical Wire Connector Male Female Spade Connectors Wire Crimp Terminal Block with Insulating Sleeve Kit 2.8mm 4.8mm 6.3mm
features: Made from tinned copper, thickness 0.25-0.8mm, suitable for 22-14 gauge wire
Comes with insulating sleeves kit, safe to use
Storage in the transparent box for easy store and carry
Wire crimp type is good for home appliances, car/boat speaker, auto, audio system for battery or rocker switch quick connecting/disconnecting
description: This is a male and female spade crimp terminal connector kit including 2.8mm/ 4.8mm/ 6.3mm type, come with insulating sleeves. The crimp terminals are made from copper with good conductivity, good for wire connecting. Specifications: 6.3mm Type: thickness: 0.4mm (spade male), 0.8mm (spade female), compatible wire: 0.75-2.5mm (AWG 18-14) 4.8mm Type: thickness: 0.35mm (spade male), 0.5mm (spade female), compatible wire: 0.75-2.5mm2 (AWG 18-14) 2.8mm Type: thickness: 0.25mm (spade male), 0.5mm (spade female), compatible wire: 0.5-1.5mm2 (AWG 22-16) Features: -Not possibly open under normal conditions of stress or wire pull. -Full port barrel designed, well to crimp solid wires or stranded wires -Suitable for the connection in power cable (AWG 22-14) with electrical equipments -Work well with the machinery, cars, fixing domestic appliances, computer or other automatic equipment Package includes: 30pcs X 2.8mmm Male Spade Crimp Terminal Connector 30pcs X 4.8mm Male Spade Crimp Terminal Connector 30pcs X 6.3mm Male Spade Crimp Terminal Connector 30pcs X 2.8mmm Female Spade Crimp Terminal Connector 30pcs X 4.8mm Female Spade Crimp Terminal Connector 30pcs X 6.3mm Female Spade Crimp Terminal Connector 90pcs X Insulating Sleeve
